title: pilosella blyttiana subsp. latibractea
intro: Pilosella blyttiana subsp. latibractea is a subspecies of the plant Pilosella blyttiana, also known as a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella blyttiana subsp. latibractea include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
